name: Telegrapho
description: Private copy and paste between your devices
compose:
name: slashnode-telegrapho
services:
  app:
    image: ghcr.io/egzola/telegrapho:1.0.1
    container_name: telegrapho
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      PORT: '3712'
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:3712:3712
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
